query: SpaceX IPO SPCX Nasdaq June 2026 latest news valuation pricing
answer:
This is an excellent and comprehensive set of findings. Let me compile the final synthesis.

---

## SpaceX IPO / SPCX Nasdaq — Research Report (as of June 3, 2026)

### Executive Summary

SpaceX (Space Exploration Technologies Corp.) has filed for an IPO on Nasdaq under the ticker **SPCX**. The S-1 was filed with the SEC on **May 20, 2026**, targeting a valuation of up to **$1.75 trillion**, which would make it the largest IPO in history. As of June 3, 2026, **shares have not yet begun trading** — the IPO is expected to price sometime in June 2026.

---

### 1. IPO Timeline & Status

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| **Dec 10, 2025** | Elon Musk confirmed SpaceX would pursue an IPO, targeting mid-2026 |
| **Jan 2026** | Four banks selected to lead the IPO (WSJ) |
| **Feb 2, 2026** | SpaceX acquired xAI in an all-stock deal (SpaceX valued at $1T, xAI at $250B) |
| **Mar 10, 2026** | Bloomberg reported SpaceX targeting $1.75T valuation |
| **Mar 11, 2026** | Reuters reported SpaceX seeking Nasdaq listing and early Nasdaq-100 inclusion |
| **May 20, 2026** | **S-1 filed with the SEC** — IPO process officially initiated |
| **June 2026 (expected)** | IPO pricing and commencement of trading |

**Current status**: The CNBC quote page for SPCX:NASDAQ exists but shows all price fields as undefined/0.00 — the ticker has been reserved but **trading has NOT commenced**.

---

### 2. Valuation Trajectory

SpaceX's private-market valuation has surged dramatically:

| Date | Valuation | Context |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Dec 2024 | **$350 billion** | Private funding round |
| Jul 2025 | **$400 billion** | $5B equity issuance |
| Dec 2025 | **$800 billion** | Internal share buyback offer — "world's most valuable private company" |
| Jan 2026 | **$1 trillion** | Valuation in xAI acquisition deal |
| Feb 2026 | **$1.25 trillion** | Combined SpaceX + xAI post-acquisition |
| IPO target | **$1.75 trillion** | Bloomberg, March 2026 |

The IPO is expected to raise up to **$50 billion**.

---

### 3. SpaceX Financials (from S-1 Filing, FY 2025)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Revenue | **$18.7 billion** |
| Operating income | **$(2.6) billion** (loss) |
| Net income | **$(4.9) billion** (loss) |
| Total assets | **$92.1 billion** |
| Total equity | **$2.6 billion** |

---

### 4. SPCX Ticker Clarification

- **SPCX is SpaceX's chosen Nasdaq ticker symbol** — it is the company's trade name abbreviation.
- **No pre-existing ETF, SPAC, or other security** was found using the SPCX ticker. The ticker was available and claimed by SpaceX.

---

### 5. Governance & Ownership

- **Elon Musk** holds **42% equity** and **79% voting control**
- The shareholding structure effectively prevents anyone other than Musk from removing himself as CEO/Chairman
- This governance structure has drawn scrutiny (noted by Harvard Law professor Lucian Bebchuk)

---

### 6. Key Recent Context (May–June 2026)

- SpaceX's S-1 disclosed plans for **data centers in space**
- SpaceX also acquired **Cursor** (AI coding startup) for **$60 billion** in April 2026
- SpaceX is part of a broader "tech mega-IPO race" alongside **OpenAI** and **Anthropic**, all filing in 2026
- Sector classification debate: CNBC reported discussion about which S&P sector index SpaceX should be assigned to
- CNBC (June 2, 2026): "SpaceX is coming to your retirement account. Not everyone is thrilled."

---
